audit_items.proof_trace: All four rounding operations in _getAssetOutAmount favor the protocol: mulDiv (floor) on the subtracted priceMultiplier reduction keeps priceMultiplier at or above the exact value; mulDivUp and mulWadUp on the USD conversion and multiplier application round the USD value up; and the final mulDivUp on the assetOut conversion rounds up the amount pulled from the bidder. The returned assetOutAmount is used directly as the safeTransferFrom pull amount (L453), so rounding-up ensures bidder pays ≥ fair market value.
